clonal_complex.label: emerging outbreak lineage
clonal_complex.tooltip: CC6 has been associated with recent deli-meat outbreaks; classified as hypervirulent in recent literature.

import_signal.evidence: country mismatch between human and food isolates

clonal_complex.label: maternal-fetal lineage
clonal_complex.tooltip: CC4 (the 'Listeria epidemica' lineage) shows strong association with maternal-fetal disease and severe outcomes.

clonal_complex.label: outbreak-associated lineage
clonal_complex.tooltip: CC2 has appeared in multiple large multistate outbreaks; clinically common.

import_signal.evidence: country mismatch between human and food isolates

source_summary.source: environmental swab sponge new plastic bucket interior

clonal_complex.label: food-common, lower-virulence
clonal_complex.tooltip: CC9 is frequently isolated from food and food-processing environments but appears less often than expected in clinical cases.

clonal_complex.label: hypervirulent lineage
clonal_complex.tooltip: CC1 isolates historically over-represented in invasive listeriosis cases and associated with dairy-related outbreaks.

import_signal.evidence: country mismatch between human and food isolates
